vocab.meaning: có khiếu trồng cây, mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: To be honest, I don't really have a green thumb; every time I try to grow something, it withers within a week.

vocab.meaning: thổi bùng sức sống vào (không gian, vạn vật)
vocab.example: Adding a few potted plants really breathed life into my cramped apartment and made it feel much more like a home.

vocab.meaning: thu hoạch thành quả (sau một quá trình nỗ lực)
vocab.example: After months of careful tending, I’m finally reaping the rewards as my orchids have started to bloom beautifully.

vocab.meaning: tươi như hoa, tràn đầy năng lượng
vocab.example: Waking up in a room full of greenery makes me feel as fresh as a daisy and ready to tackle the day.

vocab.meaning: nhầm lẫn, tìm kiếm giải pháp sai chỗ (dùng khi nói về việc chăm sóc cây sai cách)
vocab.example: I thought the plant needed more water, but I was barking up the wrong tree; it actually just needed more sunlight.

vocab.meaning: mọi việc diễn ra suôn sẻ, kết quả tốt đẹp
vocab.example: I was worried about my indoor garden while I was away, but thanks to the automatic drippers, everything came up roses.

vocab.meaning: vật báu, thứ mình yêu quý nhất
vocab.example: I own several plants, but this rare variegated Monstera is definitely the apple of my eye.

vocab.meaning: nói vòng vo (dùng làm filler khi trả lời câu hỏi)
vocab.example: I won't beat around the bush—I'm a terrible gardener, but I still love having a bit of nature indoors.

vocab.meaning: tô vẽ vô ích (thêm thắt vào thứ vốn đã đẹp sẵn)
vocab.example: The natural beauty of the ferns is enough; adding plastic decorations would just be gilding the lily.

vocab.meaning: diệt trừ mầm mống ngay từ đầu (nghĩa bóng hoặc nghĩa đen về sâu bệnh)
vocab.example: When I noticed some aphids on the leaves, I had to nip the problem in the bud before it spread to my other plants.
